name: sortfiles-monorepo
description: AI-Powered File Organizer - Cross-platform Desktop Application

scripts.package: npm run build && cd packages/desktop-app && npm run package
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && cd packages/desktop-app && npm run package:mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build && cd packages/desktop-app && npm run package:win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && cd packages/desktop-app && npm run package:linux
scripts.release: npm run build && cd packages/desktop-app && npm run release
